wizard.welcome.title: Attacca Claw
wizard.welcome.subtitle: AI productivity assistant
wizard.welcome.description: Attacca Claw connects your calendars, email, project management, and communication tools into a single action dashboard where an AI agent works through tasks under your oversight.
wizard.llm.title: LLM API Key
wizard.llm.description: Attacca Claw needs an API key to power the AI agent. Choose your provider and paste your key below.
wizard.llm.required: An API key is required to continue.
wizard.composio.title: Tool Integrations (Optional)
wizard.composio.description: Add a Composio API key to connect tools like Gmail, Google Calendar, Slack, and more. You can skip this and add it later in Settings.
wizard.composio.key_placeholder: Paste your Composio API key here
wizard.composio.get_key: Get a free key at composio.dev
wizard.tools.title: Connect Your Tools
wizard.tools.description: Connect the tools you use daily. You can always add more later in Settings.
wizard.tools.no_composio: Add a Composio API key first to connect tools. Go back to add one, or skip this step.
wizard.tools.activecollab_error: ActiveCollab requires email and password. Connect it in Settings after setup.
wizard.tools.telegram_error: Telegram requires a bot token. Connect it in Settings after setup.
wizard.telemetry.title: Research Telemetry (Optional)
wizard.telemetry.description: Help improve Attacca Claw by sharing anonymous usage data. This is completely optional and off by default.
wizard.telemetry.what_collected_items: Trust tier usage patterns, task success/failure rates, feature engagement metrics.
wizard.telemetry.what_not_collected_item: API keys, personal data, email content, file contents, conversation text, or any identifiable information.
wizard.ready.title: You're all set!
wizard.ready.composio_skipped: Tool integrations skipped (add later in Settings)
capture.ask_placeholder: What do you want to know?
capture.text_placeholder: Paste text, write a note, or describe something you want to remember...
capture.url_hint: The agent will read and analyze the content of the URL.
capture.url_error_default: Could not extract content from the URL
capture.offline_notice: Agent disconnected — reconnect to process captures.
capturePanel.placeholder: What's on your mind right now...
capturePanel.type.question: question
schedule.loading: Reading your calendar, inbox and tasks…
schedule.empty: Generate your daily landscape to see what matters today.
workflows.input_placeholder: Paste the text to process, or describe the input...
workflows.title: Teach the agent
workflows.description: Describe a recurring task and the agent will build a reusable workflow. Be specific about the trigger, steps, and expected output.
workflows.empty_paste: Paste the text you want to process, or describe what to run.
takeover.scope.gcal.label: Google Calendar
takeover.scope.gcal.accept_desc: Only if available. Conflicts → save for you.
takeover.scope.gcal.reject_desc: If overlap, reply 'not available' to organizer.
takeover.scope.gmail.label: Gmail
takeover.scope.gmail.reply_desc: Only those marked urgent with standard reply.
takeover.scope.slack.label: Slack
takeover.scope.slack.post_desc: Team or client messages — high risk.
takeover.scope.clickup.label: ClickUp
takeover.scope.asana.label: Asana
takeover.scope.trello.label: Trello
takeover.scope.notion.label: Notion
takeover.scope.notion.pages_desc: Notes and internal docs — no sharing.
takeover.scope.gdrive.label: Google Drive
takeover.hours_exact: exact hours — or activate manually when you return
takeover.briefing.title: Exit briefing
takeover.briefing.desc: Tell the agent how long you'll be away and what it can touch.
takeover.briefing.desc_tail: What it can't resolve without you, it saves for when you return.
takeover.briefing.duration_q: How long will you be away?
takeover.briefing.scope_q: What can the agent do while you're away?
takeover.briefing.no_tools_hint: Connect them in the Connections section so the agent can act.
takeover.briefing.exceptions_placeholder: e.g. Don't reply to anything from Pedro until I talk to him. Ignore the proposal thread for now. If anything comes from client Acme, save it without acting.
takeover.briefing.exceptions_hint: The agent reads this before acting. Specific helps more than general.
takeover.briefing.activate_stop: You can stop it at any time from any view.
takeover.briefing.aside_desc_tail: alone. The other {count} it saves for when you return.
takeover.briefing.aside_empty: Connect tools to see the agent's plan.
takeover.active.title: The agent is in charge
takeover.active.error_start_desc: Could not connect to the agent.
takeover.return.title: Welcome back
takeover.return.done_title: Done — completed while you were away
takeover.ended: Take Over ended — control returned to user
takeover.activated: Take Over activated — agent took control
takeover.active.held_empty: Nothing held yet — the agent is handling everything.
takeover.return.no_activity: No activity recorded in this session.
takeover.return.agent_fallback_done: I handled {count} items while you were away.
takeover.return.agent_fallback_empty: I was monitoring without finding anything to process alone.
takeover.return.agent_held_note: The {count} pending items require your judgment.
takeover.return.review_held: Review the marked items — some may be urgent.
settings.title: Settings
settings.trust.title: Trust profile
settings.trust.desc: Define how much autonomy the agent has when acting on your behalf.
settings.trust.desc_accent: You can change it at any time
settings.trust.scenario.cautious: An email arrives from a client. The agent reads it, drafts a reply and shows it to you for approval before sending. It also asks for confirmation before creating any task.
settings.trust.scenario.balanced: The agent archives and labels your inbox without asking. If it wants to send an email on your behalf, a notice appears with a button to approve or cancel in 30 seconds.
settings.trust.scenario.autonomous: The agent processes your inbox, creates tasks and cancels a low-impact meeting on its own. A 2-min countdown appears for sending an email — if you don't cancel it, it sends.
settings.trust.profile.desc.cautious: All medium-risk actions require confirmation. High-risk actions require blocking approval.
settings.trust.profile.desc.balanced: Medium-risk actions show a notification with undo. High-risk actions require blocking approval.
settings.trust.profile.desc.autonomous: Medium-risk actions are silently logged. High-risk actions proceed after a 2-minute delay with undo.
settings.health.task.daily-synthesis.des: Analyzes recent captures to identify patterns and update identity traits
settings.health.task.weekly-synthesis.de: Deep analysis of the week — promotes patterns to identity traits, compacts old memories
settings.health.task.importance-decay.de: Reduces importance of memories not accessed in 30+ days
Generates embeddings for memories that were saved without them
settings.rhythm.title: Your routine
settings.rhythm.desc: When you want the agent to talk to you and how it integrates into your day. The agent learns your rhythm over time, but these are the base anchors.
settings.rhythm.folder_watch_desc: The agent automatically processes new files that appear in this folder.
settings.advanced_divider: Advanced — you don't need to change this often
settings.usage.title: Agent usage
settings.usage.desc: The agent uses your own API key. Here you can see the estimated cost this month based on tokens consumed.
settings.byok.title: Use my own API key
settings.byok.desc: If you have your own API key from Anthropic, OpenAI or Google, you can use it directly. This removes the monthly limit and routes calls through your account.
settings.byok.enabled_desc: Active — the agent will use your key directly.
settings.byok.disabled_desc: Disabled — the agent uses Attacca's shared infrastructure.
settings.byok.provider_q: Which provider do you want to use?
settings.composio.title: Composio API Key
settings.composio.desc: Add a Composio key to connect tools like Gmail, Calendar and Slack.
settings.composio.get_key: Get a free key at composio.dev
settings.composio.placeholder: Paste your Composio API key here
settings.composio.no_key_hint: Without a Composio key, the agent works for chat but cannot connect external tools.
settings.telemetry.title: Research data
settings.telemetry.desc: If enabled, the agent shares anonymous usage data to improve the product. Emails, files, messages or any identifiable data are never shared.
settings.telemetry.toggle_desc: Usage patterns: which actions you approve, how often you use each section. No content, no personal IDs.
settings.health.title: System Health
settings.health.desc: Background task status: memory synthesis, importance decay, embedding backfill.
connections.title: Connected tools
connections.desc: The tools the agent can use on your behalf. Connect or disconnect at any time.
connections.activecollab.title: Connect ActiveCollab
connections.activecollab.desc: Your password is sent directly to ActiveCollab and never stored by Attacca.
connections.telegram_error: Telegram requires a bot token. Connect it in Settings after setup.
connections.error_no_redirect: Missing redirect URL or connection ID.
toolCard.disconnect_desc: Stored credentials will be removed. You can reconnect anytime.
catalog.title: Full catalog
escapeHatch.title: Connect a custom tool
escapeHatch.desc: If your tool has a public API, the agent can try to create a direct connection using its documentation.
customTools.title: Connect your own tool
customTools.desc: Describe the tool and how you use it. The agent investigates if it has a public API and creates a direct connection.
customTools.no_tech: You don't need to know anything technical — just describe the tool and what you want the agent to do with it.
customTools.tool_label: What tool do you want to connect?
customTools.tool_hint: The agent will search for its API documentation and check if a connection is possible.
customTools.usage_label: What do you use it for and what do you want the agent to do with it?
customTools.usage_placeholder: e.g. I use Calendly for scheduling meetings with clients. I want the agent to check new bookings and add them to my daily briefing.
customTools.experimental_warn: This is experimental — it doesn't always work, but when it does it's like having a custom integration in minutes.
offline.message: You're offline — your assistant is paused. Everything you see reflects the last known state.
approval.title: Approval Required
approval.standing_label: Grant 30-day standing approval for this action type
transcript.title: New meeting
transcript.desc: Finish the meeting, drop the transcript and go do whatever you need to do. The agent does the rest.
transcript.meeting_placeholder: e.g. Client kickoff / Product sync / 1:1 with Pedro
transcript.context_q: Anything the agent should know before processing?
transcript.context_placeholder: e.g. This was a new client meeting. I'm responsible for the proposal.
transcript.context_hint: The agent uses this to decide what belongs to you vs. others.
metaAgent.title: Custom Tool Connection
metaAgent.desc: Connect a tool that isn't in the built-in catalog. Describe it and the agent will investigate its API and create a connection.
metaAgent.usage_label: How do you use this tool?
metaAgent.usage_placeholder: Describe what you use this tool for...
